'''Reynon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent [[Harovan Toth]] was a native of Reynon.

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], an amount of Reynonian dissenters sympathized with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and lived on the Rebel safeworld of [[Isis/Legends|Isis]]. [[Harovan Toth]] himself sent his own daughter, [[Samona]], to live with them.

{{Planet-stub}}
